constraint.name: ca_tpvsneo_caja_movimientos_cajas
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idcaja) REFERENCES tpvsneo_cajas (idcaja) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_tpvsneo_caja_movimientos_tpvsneo
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idtpv) REFERENCES tpvsneo (idtpv) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_tpvsneo_caja_movimientos_users
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
